owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Monthly dispatcher bridge shipped; next bounded work is owner-facing reactive capability/source-quality visibility plus follow-up refresh

chunks.title: Surface reactive capability in Status Center
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Status Center visibility / generated reactive policy pack
chunks.goal: Expose generated-overlay reactive capability (`post_session_only` vs `event_family_dispatch`), event-family coverage, and bounded bootstrap/source-quality signals in owner-facing Status Center, tray, and stable CLI surfaces.
acceptance: Owner-facing readiness surfaces can distinguish a post-session-only overlay from an event-family-dispatch reactive overlay without opening the manifest by hand.
At least one bounded source-quality/bootstrap provenance signal from the generated manifest is surfaced where the owner can actually see it.
Missing or malformed manifest metadata fails closed to an unknown/attention signal instead of silently claiming reactive capability.
Regression coverage proves the surfaced capability/source-quality fields stay aligned with generated-overlay manifest metadata.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after reactive capability signal
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after the reactive capability/source-quality visibility slice lands.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped handwritten monthly dispatcher bridge and the owner-facing reactive capability/source-quality visibility state.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving completed lifecycle/reactive groundwork chunks as ready.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-05 is replaced, not duplicated.
